title: Hadrolaelia virens
taxonomy: Hadrolaelia virens is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Hadrolaelia, which is a small genus of orchids found in South America. The genus Hadrolaelia is part of the subfamily Oncidiinae, which is a group of orchids known for their small flowers and compact growth habits. The family Orchidaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as orchids, with over 30,000 known species. Hadrolaelia virens is native to Brazil and is prized by orchid enthusiasts for its unique and colorful blooms.
